description: Design mode — compute sample size for thumbnail CTR A/B test with baseline 6% and 5% MDE

variants.name: variant_a
variants.description: current thumbnail — face close-up with text

variants.name: variant_b
variants.description: new thumbnail — finished room wide shot

expected.test_plan: non-empty string describing how to run the experiment

prohibit: fabricated sample size not derived from power calculation
estimated_duration_days with a specific value when daily impressions not provided

description: Analyze mode — clear winner with sufficient sample size, computation tool connected

expected.p_value: numeric value < 0.05 (expected given the effect size)

prohibit: winner = variant_a when variant_b has higher success rate and p < 0.05
winner = no_significant_difference when effect is large and n is large
p_value null when computation tool connected

description: Analyze mode — underpowered test with small sample flags directional-only result

expected.retrieval_gaps: contains note about underpowered test or insufficient sample
expected.recommendation: mentions that result is directional but not conclusive

prohibit: winner = variant_b stated with confidence when test is underpowered
no mention of underpowered test or small sample size
p_value presented without caveat about low power

description: No computation tool connected — design mode produces formula and code, analyze mode withholds winner

expected.sample_size_per_variant: may be computed from formula or null with code provided
expected.retrieval_gaps: contains note about no computation engine connected

prohibit: computation_source other than guidance_only when no tool available
no runnable code or formula in guidance-only mode
